main.description: Recipient response to a badge award.

badgeAward.description: Strong reference to the badge award being responded to. The record referenced must conform with the lexicon app.certified.badge.award.

response.description: The recipient’s response for the badge (accepted or rejected).

weight.description: Optional relative weight for accepted badges, assigned by the recipient.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created
